hooks.command: try { $d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $n=($d.tool_input.file_path -split '[\\/]')[-1]; if((($n -eq '.env' -or $n -like '.env.*' -or $n -like '*.env') -and $n -ne '.env.example') -or ($n -like 'nocommit*.properties')){ Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading this file is blocked by policy (.env / nocommit*.properties hold secrets). Only .env.example may be read."}}' } } catch {}

try { $d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd=$d.tool_input.command; $hasSecret=$false; foreach($m in [regex]::Matches($cmd,'[\w./\\-]+')){ $n=($m.Value -split '[\\/]')[-1]; if(((($n -eq '.env' -or $n -like '.env.*' -or $n -like '*.env') -and $n -ne '.env.example') -or ($n -like 'nocommit*.properties'))){ $hasSecret=$true } }; $isRead=($cmd -match '(?i)\b(cat|tac|type|more|less|head|tail|nl|od|xxd|hexdump|strings|bat|batcat|grep|egrep|fgrep|rg|awk|gawk|sed|gc|Get-Content|Select-String|sls|source|cat-file)\b') -or ($cmd -match '<\s*[^<\s]'); if($hasSecret -and $isRead){ Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"This command reads a protected secrets file (.env / nocommit*.properties). Reading those via the shell is blocked by policy; only .env.example may be read."}}' } } catch {}
